skill_tested: Counting conflict contexts from a supplied list

common_mistake: Students omit contemporary examples.

question_text: Civility is not the same as silence because

skill_tested: Counting political system cards from a mixed list
question_text: A classroom tally records how many of the following system cards are political (not economic): consensus decision making; direct democracy; representative democracy; authoritarian political systems; traditional economies; free market economies; command economies; mixed economies. Count only the political cards listed.
explanation: Political: consensus, direct democracy, representative democracy, authoritarian (4). Economic: traditional, free market, command, mixed (4).
common_mistake: Students count all eight or miss consensus as political.
